member.summary: Human-readable details explaining the outcome.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.EvaluationOutcome.SubmittedOrder

member.returns: A rejected .

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.EvaluationOutcome.NoSignal(System.String)

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.H1Snapshot
member.summary: Everything the orchestrator needs from the H1 timeframe for one evaluation. All values are pre-computed by Infrastructure from fully closed bars only. Index convention matches spec: Bar1 = [1] (last closed), Bar6 = [6].

member.summary: H1 EMA(50) evaluated at the last closed bar ([1]).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.H1Snapshot.Ema200Bar1
member.summary: H1 EMA(200) evaluated at the last closed bar ([1]).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.H1Snapshot.Ema50Bar6
member.summary: H1 EMA(50) evaluated at bar [6], for the slope/alignment trend filter.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.H1Snapshot.Atr14Bar1
member.summary: H1 ATR(14) evaluated at the last closed bar ([1]), used for volatility context.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.H1Snapshot.IsValid
member.summary: True if H1 data passed warm-up and quality checks (Rule D.*).

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot
member.summary: Everything the orchestrator needs from the M15 timeframe for one evaluation.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.Candles

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.Ema50Bar1

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.Adx14Bar1
member.summary: M15 ADX(14) evaluated at the last closed bar ([1]), for trend strength.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.Atr14Bar1
member.summary: M15 ATR(14) evaluated at the last closed bar ([1]), the sizing/reference ATR.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.SmaAtr100Bar1

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.Atr14Current
member.summary: Live (current) ATR14 for trigger-time distance check (Rule K.4).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.M15Snapshot.IsValid
member.summary: True if M15 data passed warm-up and quality checks (Rule D.*).

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Orchestration.BarEvaluationOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates one full evaluation cycle on M15 bar close, following the decision order in spec section 20. Steps 15 (basket/USD exposure) are intentionally omitted — this build is scoped to a single symbol (EURUSD) by explicit decision; re-add PortfolioRiskGuard calls before adding a second correlated symbol.
Constructs the orchestrator with its execution, market, clock, news, state-store, logging, per-symbol configuration, and state-machine dependencies.
member.param: Execution port used to query/submit/cancel broker orders.
Persistence port for bot state and daily/weekly counters.
Symbol state machine tracking the current per-symbol lifecycle.

member.summary: Runs one full M15 bar-close evaluation cycle in spec decision order (section 20): validate data/clock → risk locks → state/window/news checks → H1 trend → M15 volatility → pullback signal → volume/spread → swing → entry/SL/TP → sizing → submit → confirm. Always returns an outcome (submitted, no-signal, or rejected).
member.param: Pre-computed H1 snapshot from closed bars.
Pre-computed M15 snapshot, including closed candles.
Account-level figures for risk and sizing.
UTC time of the bar close being evaluated.
member.returns: The for this evaluation cycle.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Orchestration.BarEvaluationOrchestrator.EstimateRequiredMargin(System.Double,CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.SymbolInfo,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Rough margin estimate for the pre-submit check (Rule L.4): notional / leverage. This is a fallback only — Infrastructure should prefer the broker's own margin calculation (cTrader exposes Symbol.GetEstimatedMargin) when available, since real margin can depend on tiered leverage, hedging mode, etc.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort
member.summary: Port for time/session logic. All windows computed with IANA time zones so DST is handled automatically (Rule B.1). Rules B.2, B.3.

member.summary: Current UTC time used for all session/window evaluations.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort.IsWithinEntryWindow(System.DateTime)
member.summary: True if UtcNow falls inside one of the allowed entry windows (London open 08:00–11:00 Europe/London, NY morning 08:30–11:30 America/New_York). Rule B.2. Checked at order-activation time, not just signal time.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort.IsPastFridayNewOrderCutoff(System.DateTime)
member.summary: True from Friday 12:00 New York onward — no new orders. Rule B.3.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort.IsPastFridayForceCloseTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: True at/after Friday 15:45 New York — force-close all trades. Rule B.3.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort.IsWithinRolloverWindow(System.DateTime)
member.summary: True if inside the broker rollover blackout window. Rule B.3.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Ports.IClockPort.IsClockReliable(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Server time freshness/clock-skew check inputs (Rule D.1).

member.summary: N.3 — Checks if a given time falls within the prohibited window.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator
member.summary: Order entry calculations. Rules K.1, K.2, K.4. Pure domain logic — no cAlgo.API reference.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.ComputeBuyEntry(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: K.1 — Computes buy stop entry price. Buffer = max(TickSize, 0.02 × ATR14[1]); Entry = round_up(High[1] + Buffer).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.ComputeSellEntry(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: K.1 — Computes sell stop entry price. Buffer = max(TickSize, 0.02 × ATR14[1]); Entry = round_down(Low[1] − Buffer).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.ComputeExpiry(System.DateTime)
member.summary: K.2 — Order expiry = signal close time + 30 minutes.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.PassesTriggerDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: K.4 — Trigger distance check. Returns true if |ExpectedFillPrice − EMA20_current| <= 0.60 × ATR14_current.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.RoundUpToTick(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Rounds price up to the nearest tick size.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.OrderEntryCalculator.RoundDownToTick(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Rounds price down to the nearest tick size.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.TradeManagementCalculator
member.summary: Trade management calculations. Rules M.1, M.3. Pure domain logic — no cAlgo.API reference.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.TradeManagementCalculator.ComputeTakeProfit(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: M.1 — Take-profit level. R = |FillPrice − InitialSL|; Buy: TP = FillPrice + 2R; Sell: TP = FillPrice − 2R. TP is rounded to tick size.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Orders.TradeManagementCalculator.IsTimeExitTriggered(System.Int32)
member.summary: M.3 — Time exit check. Returns true if 32 M15 candles have elapsed since entry. Caller passes the number of completed M15 candles since entry open.

member.summary: P.3 — Weekly drawdown check.

member.summary: P.4 — Max daily entries check.

member.summary: P.5 — Consecutive loss check. lossCount: number of consecutive losses (result < −0.05R).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.DrawdownGuard.IsKillSwitchTriggered(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: P.6 — Kill switch (total drawdown from equity high-water mark).

member.summary: O.1 — Per-trade risk cap.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PortfolioRiskGuard.PassesReservedRisk(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: O.2 — Total reserved risk check.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PortfolioRiskGuard.ValidateMetalBasket(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: O.3 — Metal basket risk check.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PortfolioRiskGuard.ValidateUsdExposure(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: O.4 — USD directional exposure check. sameDirectionRisk = sum of risks in the same USD direction.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer
member.summary: Position sizing. Rules L.1–L.5.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.ComputeTradeRiskMoney(System.Double)
member.summary: L.1 — Trade risk money = Equity × 0.30%.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.ComputeLossPerLotAtSL(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: L.2 dependency — Loss per lot if SL is hit, including a conservative estimate of commission and slippage (Rule: "Commission برآوردی و یک Slippage محافظه‌کارانه در LossPerLotAtSL لحاظ می‌شوند").
member.param: Money value of one tick, one lot.
Extra price distance to assume for slippage.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.ComputeRawVolume(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: L.2 — Raw volume = TradeRiskMoney / LossPerLotAtSL. Returns (volume, rejection). Null volume means rejection.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.RoundVolume(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: L.3 — Rounds volume down to LotStep. Returns (rounded, rejection).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.PassesMarginCheck(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: L.4 — Margin check. Returns true if free margin is sufficient. Caller must compute required margin externally.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.PositionSizer.ValidatePostRoundingRisk(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: L.5 — Post-rounding risk check.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SpreadFilter
member.summary: Spread filter. Rules I.1, I.2, I.3. Baseline must be computed externally (infrastructure).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SpreadFilter.Passes(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: I.2 — Checks spread against baseline and absolute cap.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.StopLossCalculator
member.summary: Stop-loss calculation and validation. Rules J.4, J.5, J.6.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.StopLossCalculator.ComputeLevel(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: J.4 — Computes raw SL level before broker validation.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.StopLossCalculator.ValidateDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: J.5 — Validates stop distance in ATR multiples against symbol bounds. Returns null if valid, or the appropriate rejection ReasonCode.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.StopLossCalculator.ValidateBrokerLimits(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: J.6 — Validates SL against broker StopLevel and FreezeLevel. For buy: SL must be at or below current bid minus StopLevel. For sell: SL must be at or above current ask plus StopLevel.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SwingDetector
member.summary: Swing detection. Rules J.1, J.2, J.3. Pure domain logic on closed M15 candles.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SwingDetector.IsConfirmedSwingLow(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.Candle[],System.Int32)
member.summary: J.1 — Confirmed swing low at index k. Requires candles[k-2]..candles[k+2] to exist (all closed).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SwingDetector.IsConfirmedSwingHigh(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.Candle[],System.Int32)
member.summary: J.2 — Confirmed swing high at index k.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.SwingDetector.SelectSwing(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.Candle[],CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,System.Int32)
member.summary: J.3 — Selects the latest (most recent) confirmed swing within lookback. candles[0] is the signal candle ([1] in spec terms); candles[1..lookbackCount] are the closed candles before it. Buy → swing low; Sell → swing high. Returns (found, price).

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.VolumeFilter
member.summary: Volume filter. Rules H.1, H.2. Baseline must be computed externally (infrastructure).

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.VolumeFilter.IsBaselineValid(System.Int32)
member.summary: H.1 — Validates that the baseline has enough observations. Caller must provide pre-computed median baseline.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Risk.VolumeFilter.Passes(System.Int64,System.Double)
member.summary: H.2 — Compares tick volume against baseline.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalEvaluator
member.summary: Pure domain evaluator for H1 trend, M15 volatility band, and M15 signal conditions. Rules E.1–E.3, F.1–F.2, G.1–G.3. No state; no cAlgo.API reference.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalEvaluator.EvaluateH1Trend(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: E.1/E.2/E.3 — Evaluate H1 trend direction from closed-bar indicators. Returns Buy, Sell, or None (neutral). NaN or non-positive ATR → neutral.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalEvaluator.EvaluateVolatilityBand(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: F.1/F.2 — Evaluate M15 volatility band. Ratio in [0.70, 1.80] → proceed. Otherwise → rejection. Denominator zero or NaN → REJECT_DATA_INVALID.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalEvaluator.EvaluateBuySignal(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.Candle,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: G.2 — Evaluate M15 buy signal. All 10 conditions must pass. Returns first failing condition as rejection.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalEvaluator.EvaluateSellSignal(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection,CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.Candle,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: G.3 — Evaluate M15 sell signal. All 10 conditions must pass. Returns first failing condition as rejection.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalResult
member.summary: Signal evaluation outcome. Direction = None means no signal; ReasonCode explains why. Consumed by SignalEvaluator and downstream application layer.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalResult.Direction
member.summary: Signal direction. None = no signal.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalResult.RejectionReason
member.summary: Rejection code. None when signal is valid.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalResult.Of(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.TradeDirection)
member.summary: Creates a valid signal result.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Signals.SignalResult.Rejected(CleanPullM15Pro.Domain.Market.ReasonCode)
member.summary: Creates a rejection result (Direction = None).

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot
member.summary: cBot lifecycle adapter. Single-symbol build (EURUSD) — the chart/instance this cBot is attached to determines the traded symbol; add a separate instance per symbol in cTrader if you want more than one, but portfolio-level risk sharing (metal basket, USD exposure — Rules O.3/O.4) is NOT implemented in this build.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.RolloverHourUtc
member.summary: UTC hour (0–23) at which the daily counter rollover window is centered (Rule P.1 rollover reference).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.MinStopAtr
member.summary: Minimum stop distance as a multiple of ATR14[1] (Rule J.2 lower bound on the stop).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.MaxStopAtr
member.summary: Maximum stop distance as a multiple of ATR14[1] (Rule J.2 upper bound on the stop).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.AbsoluteSpreadCap
member.summary: Absolute spread cap in price units; entry rejected when current spread exceeds this (Rule F.3).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.CommissionPerLotRoundTurn
member.summary: Estimated round-turn commission per lot, folded into LossPerLotAtSL (Rule L.2).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.ConservativeSlippagePriceUnits
member.summary: Conservative extra price distance assumed as slippage when sizing loss per lot (Rule L.2).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.DisableNewsFilter
member.summary: TESTING ONLY — when true the news filter (Rule N.*) is bypassed. Never enable on a live account; see open-questions.md.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.OnStart
member.summary: Called once when the robot starts: wires all cTrader adapters, loads persisted state, builds the evaluation orchestrator, and subscribes to position-closed events.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.OnBar
member.summary: Called on each closed bar: rolls counters, reconciles broker state, and — when — builds the H1/M15/quality/account snapshots and runs the evaluation orchestrator.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.OnTick
member.summary: Re-validates a pending order on every tick (Rule K.3) and cancels it if past the Friday new-order cutoff or inside the rollover window.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.OnStop
member.summary: Called when the robot stops: detaches the position-closed event handler.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Host.CleanPullM15ProBot.RollDailyWeeklyCountersIfNeeded
member.summary: Rule P.1 — day starts at New York 00:00, week starts Monday New York 00:00. Resets DailyStartEquity/WeeklyStartEquity/FilledEntriesToday at those boundaries.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter
member.summary: Implements IClockPort using IANA time zones for DST-safe session windows. Rules B.1–B.3. .NET 6+ resolves IANA ids ("Europe/London", "America/New_York") on Windows via ICU; if FindSystemTimeZoneById throws on your runtime, this falls back to the equivalent Windows time zone id.

member.name: F:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter._rolloverUtcTimeOfDay
member.summary: Time-of-day (UTC, broker-declared) the rollover window is centered on.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.#ctor(cAlgo.API.Robot,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Creates the adapter bound to the host cBot and a rollover time-of-day.
member.param: UTC time-of-day the daily rollover window is centered on.

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.UtcNow
member.summary: Current broker-reported UTC time.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.IsWithinEntryWindow(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Rule B.2/B.3 — true when is inside the London open (08:00–11:00) or New York morning (08:30–11:30) local session windows.
member.returns: True inside an allowed entry session; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.IsPastFridayNewOrderCutoff(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Rule B.3 — true when is past Friday's New York new-order cutoff (12:00 NY). Saturday/Sunday return true (market shut regardless).
member.returns: True when no new orders may be opened after this time on Friday.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.IsPastFridayForceCloseTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Rule B.3 — true when is past Friday's New York force-close time (15:45 NY), at which open positions must be closed.
member.returns: True when existing positions must be force-closed.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.IsWithinRolloverWindow(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Rule P.1 — true when falls within the ±15-minute rollover window centered on the configured rollover UTC time-of-day (today's or yesterday's, to cover the wrap-around near midnight).
member.returns: True inside the daily rollover window; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Clock.CTraderClockAdapter.IsClockReliable(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Rule A.2 — true when the broker clock is not stale: is within 10 seconds of the last price tick .
member.param: Timestamp of the most recent price update.
member.returns: True when the clock is considered reliable; false (fail closed) when stale.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Execution.CTraderExecutionAdapter
member.summary: Implements IExecutionPort using cAlgo's Robot trading API. NOTE: this file is the most likely to need small adjustments after the first build — cAlgo's PlaceStopOrder overload set and TradeResult/PendingOrder members can differ slightly by SDK version. The logic (SL/TP attached at submit time, ambiguous responses never treated as success) must be kept if anything here is adjusted.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Execution.CTraderExecutionAdapter.#ctor(cAlgo.API.Robot)
member.summary: Creates the execution adapter bound to the host cBot's trade API.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Execution.CTraderExecutionAdapter.SubmitPendingOrder(CleanPullM15Pro.Application.Contracts.PendingOrderRequest)
member.summary: Submits a stop order with absolute SL/TP attached at submit time (Rules J.4, M.1). An ambiguous or unsuccessful broker response is never treated as success.
member.returns: Ok with the broker order id, or Fail with the broker error/null-response reason.

member.name: M:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.Execution.CTraderExecutionAdapter.CancelPendingOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Cancels the pending order with id . A missing order returns true (already gone).
member.param: Broker id of the pending order to cancel.
member.returns: True if the order is gone (already-cancelled or cancellation confirmed); false if cancellation failed.

member.summary: Volume baseline (Rule H.*): median tick volume of the same M15 slot over the previous 20 valid trading days. "Same slot" = same hour:minute-of-day.

member.name: T:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.News.ManualNewsCalendarAdapter
member.summary: OPEN QUESTION (see README/open-questions): cAlgo does not ship a built-in economic calendar API. This adapter is a manual/stub implementation: - If is empty and is true (the default, matching Rule N.3 "fail closed"), IsAvailableAndFresh returns false and ALL new entries are blocked — the bot will never trade. - Set _treatEmptyAsUnavailable=false only for controlled demo testing where you accept trading through news events; this intentionally weakens a documented safety filter and must not be used on a live account without a real calendar feed wired in. A real implementation should pull from a maintained calendar source and populate entries with real event times.

member.summary: Constructs the manual calendar. With the default , an empty event list blocks all new entries (fail closed per Rule N.3); set it false only for controlled demo testing.
member.param: When true an empty list reports the calendar as unavailable (fail closed).

member.name: P:CleanPullM15Pro.Infrastructure.CTrader.News.ManualNewsCalendarAdapter.IsAvailableAndFresh
member.summary: True when a usable calendar is available; false (fail closed) when the event list is empty and is set.

Time to test against event windows.

How far ahead to look for an approaching window.
